tweets.name: Paul Graham
tweets.text: Interesting ideas tend to appear in multiple places in slightly different forms. Though that's somewhat of a tautology, because this is a big part of what makes them interesting.

tweets.name: Paul Graham
tweets.text: (I know because my algorithm for voting is: vote for the candidates who don't have woke shibboleths in their personal statements, and it used to be hard to find any.)

tweets.name: Paul Graham
tweets.text: Only 1 of the 9 candidates for the Harvard Board of Overseers have woke shibboleths in their personal statements. Just a year or two ago the majority seemed to. There has clearly been a big change.
